text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Called to the waiting room by Gold Ship, I walk
inside to find her trembling from head to toe.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's just a routine. It's a surefire way to
make sure I'm fired up and in top condition.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
See? The people next door always get mad at me
when I do this. I'll leave the apologies to you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm in the zone! Golshi, heading out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship races out of the room before I can
reply, so I have no choice but to go next door
and apologize. At least she's in top form today.
